name: @nataliapc/mcp-openmsx
description: Model context protocol server for openMSX automation and control
author: Natalia Pujol Cremades <info@abitwitches.com>

scripts.build: shx rm -rf dist && tsc && shx chmod +x dist/server.js
scripts.build:proxy:win-x64: dotnet publish helpers/openmsx-sspi-proxy/OpenMsxSspiProxy.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true -p:TrimMode=partial -p:EnableCompressionInSingleFile=true -o bin/win-x64
scripts.build:proxy:win-x64:docker: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp -v "$PWD":/work -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0 dotnet publish helpers/openmsx-sspi-proxy/OpenMsxSspiProxy.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true -p:TrimMode=partial -p:EnableCompressionInSingleFile=true -o bin/win-x64
